description: Reconcile employee travel expenses against official GSA per diem limits in /home/ga/Documents/travel_reconciliation.xlsx. In the Expense_Claims sheet, populate the GSA_Lodging_Rate (G) and GSA_MIE_Rate (H) columns with the corresponding rates from the GSA_Rates sheet based on the State_City. Calculate the Approved_Lodging (I) and Approved_MIE (J) by capping the claimed amounts at the maximum allowable limits (daily rate multiplied by travel days). Determine the Total_Reimbursement (K) and any Overage (L). Format columns E through L as Currency ($) and apply conditional formatting to highlight overages greater than 0 in column L. Create a new sheet named Summary that displays the 'Total Company Reimbursement' and 'Total Unreimbursed Overages' calculated from the respective columns. Save the updated workbook.

metadata.data_source: Derived from official US GSA FY2024 Per Diem Rates
